caption: A man wearing a grey blazer over a white shirt and a name tag stands on a stage, presenting a slideshow. He is positioned to the left of a large screen displaying a presentation slide. The slide is titled "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML" and lists several points: "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc.)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", and "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", ending with the phrase "THE BIG PICTURE". At the bottom of the stage area, a banner reads "europython" next to a red and green logo, followed by "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks. The background of the presentation slide features a dark blue geometric pattern of interconnected lines and dots. The scene remains static with only minor changes in the man's posture across the frames.
